caseStudies.title: Scaling a Design Agency
caseStudies.description: How we helped a freelance graphic designer transition into a full-fledged agency by optimizing their financial structure.
caseStudies.fullStory: By implementing a robust accounting system and providing strategic financial advice, the designer was able to accurately track project profitability, manage cash flow effectively, and make informed decisions about hiring. This led to a 150% increase in profitability within the first year.

caseStudies.title: Tax Savings for a Tech Consultant
caseStudies.description: We identified over $20,000 in annual tax savings for an independent IT consultant.
caseStudies.fullStory: Through a detailed review of their business expenses and by restructuring their business entity to an S-Corporation, we were able to leverage tax deductions and strategies specific to their industry. This resulted in significant savings, freeing up capital for investment in new technology.

caseStudies.title: Financial Roadmap for a Writer
caseStudies.description: A freelance writer secured a mortgage and started a retirement fund within two years after we developed a personalized financial roadmap.
caseStudies.fullStory: We created a clear bookkeeping system to track fluctuating income, developed a realistic budget, and established a SEP IRA for retirement savings. With consistent, clean financial records, the writer successfully qualified for a home loan and is now building long-term wealth.
